name: @tubask/mcp
description: Hosted YouTube MCP for Claude, Cursor, and ChatGPT — search, summarize, and quote videos with 3 tools and OAuth. Production endpoint: https://tubask.app/mcp

tools.name: youtube_query
tools.description: Search YouTube, channels, playlists, comments, and multi-video creator advice.

tools.name: summarize_video
tools.description: One-call video summary with key points, chapters, and timestamped quotes.

tools.name: get_transcript
tools.description: Fetch captions with keyword search, timestamps, and time slices.
